channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sydney’s Flying Bark Studios leads major animation projects for global streaming franchises
item.description: A Sydney-based animation company, Flying Bark Studios, is playing a significant role in global entertainment production, contributing to spin-offs of major franchises such as Stranger Things and Minec...

item.title: US Navy seizes Iranian cargo ship TOUSKA after it ignores warnings during Gulf of Oman blockade
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced that the American Navy intercepted and seized an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel named TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman on Sunday (Monday AEST). The ship, which departed fro...

item.title: Government Soil Health Testing Programme Advances in 19 Regions
item.description: The Tanzanian government is making good progress with the National Soil Health Testing Programme. So far, the programme has reached 19 regions across the country, where experts have collected about 90...

item.title: Boko Haram Gives Nigerian Government 72-Hour Ultimatum Over 416 Captives In Borno
item.description: One faction of Boko Haram wey dem call Jama’atu Ahlis Sunna Lidda’awati wal-Jihad just release one video where dem give Nigerian government and other stakeholders 72-hour ultimatum. Dem threaten say i...

item.title: PDEA and Police Destroy P12 Million Worth of Marijuana Plantation in Mountain Province
item.description: Authorities from the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency-Cordillera Administrative Region, together with police units, successfully destroyed around P12 million worth of marijuana plants during a joint...

item.title: US-Iran talks in Islamabad face uncertainty after naval incident in Sea of Oman
item.description: Extraordinary security arrangements have been made in Islamabad and Rawalpindi as the second round of peace talks between the United States and Iran is set to begin this week. President Donald Trump a...

item.title: Haitian civilians block Kenyan police withdrawal amid fears of rising gang violence
item.description: There were tense scenes in parts of central Haiti after groups of civilians tried to stop Kenyan police officers from leaving as the Kenya-led Multinational Security Support (MSS) mission begins windi...

item.title: Edo Carnival organisers finally settle prizes for maiden band competition winners
item.description: Na so so relief for the winners of the first Edo Carnival band competition as the organisers finally pay them their prizes after weeks of serious backlash and social media noise. The payment ceremony ...

item.title: Madras High Court admits plea alleging over Rs 100 crore discrepancy in TVK chief Vijay's poll affidavits
item.description: The Madras High Court has admitted a petition filed by V Vignesh from Chennai seeking an Income Tax probe into the asset declarations made by actor-turned-politician Vijay, who is the leader of Tamila...

item.title: Namfrel Firmly Rejects Proposal to Postpone Barangay and SK Elections Again
item.description: The National Citizens’ Movement for Free Elections (Namfrel) has strongly opposed any further delay in the scheduled barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) elections set for November 2 this year. Acco...

item.title: B2Gold Reports Fire Damage to Crushing Circuit at Goose Mine in Nunavut, Expects Temporary Production Impact
item.description: A fire broke out on the evening of April 16, 2026, at B2Gold's Goose Mine located in the Kitikmeot Region of Nunavut, Canada. The incident caused localized damage estimated at approximately C$10 milli...

item.title: How to develop a more secure attachment style for better health, happiness and relationships
item.description: Psychiatrist Amir Levine, co-author of the bestselling book Attached, has published a follow-up titled Secure. Drawing on 16 years of reader feedback, neuroscience research and clinical practice, Levi...

item.title: Fire outbreak destroys over 2,000 bags of onions in Sokoto, leaving farmers in heavy loss
item.description: My people, e be like say another sad tori don land from Sokoto State. Many onion farmers wey work tire for months, planting and waiting for harvest, just wake up one day see their whole effort turn to...

item.title: Phil Gould criticises St George Illawarra Dragons' recent coaching appointments as short-term solutions
item.description: Phil Gould has taken aim at the St George Illawarra Dragons’ recent coaching decisions, arguing that the club has relied too heavily on short-term fixes rather than committing to a long-term strategy....

item.title: DOE Implements Uniform Pump Price Adjustments Amid National Energy Emergency
item.description: The Department of Energy (DOE) has started regulating uniform adjustments in the country's pump prices to ensure fairness for consumers facing high fuel costs caused by the ongoing conflict in the Mid...

item.title: Flood recovery, gang arrest, and fishing permit restoration mark key developments in the Western Cape
item.description: Mop-up operations are under way across several informal settlements in the Western Cape after heavy weekend rains triggered flooding. Two cold fronts brought widespread downpours that left communities...

item.title: Letters to the Editor, April 20: Readers discuss leadership, politics, nature, transit, vaccines and AI
item.description: This letters page brings together several reader responses to recent Globe and Mail coverage, spanning politics, the environment, public health, work culture and technology. One letter argues that flo...

item.title: Tanzania Expands Rural Electrification Efforts to Reach All Hamlets by 2030
item.description: Tanzania is making steady progress in expanding electricity access to rural areas, with a clear national goal of connecting all hamlets to power by 2030. According to the Rural Energy Agency (REA), mo...

item.title: Sarah Strong's Parents: Allison Feaster and Danny Strong, Former Basketball Stars Who Shaped Her Career
item.description: Sarah Strong, one of the top young talents in American collegiate basketball playing for UConn, comes from a strong basketball family. Her parents, Allison Feaster and Danny Strong, are both former pr...

item.title: Darcy Moore nears Anzac Day return for Collingwood as Essendon lose Jordan Ridley to calf injury
item.description: In the latest AFL briefing, Western Bulldogs midfielder Tom Liberatore is progressing through standard concussion protocols following his latest head knock and is not required to appear before an inde...
